use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF EXACERBATIONS OF MULTIPLE SCLEROSIS IN ADULTS WITH CORTICOTROPIN BY PROMOTING NEW VESSEL FORMATION WHEREIN VCAM-1 EXPRESSION AND ANGIOPOETIN-2 EXPRESSION IS INCREASED AFTER THE ADMINISTERING

indications.text:
1.1 Infantile Spasms
Acthar Gel is indicated as monotherapy for the treatment of infantile spasms in infants
and children under 2 years of age.
1.2 Multiple Sclerosis
